frozen().details: Is the BlobstreamX contract forzen or not.

latestBlock().details: Latest height published to the BlobstreamX contract.

state_dataCommitments(uint256).details: fetches data commitment from BlobstreamX state.

state_proofNonce().details: Nonce for proof events. Must be incremented sequentially.

params._proof: Binary Merkle tree proof that `tuple` is in the root at `_tupleRootNonce`.
params._tuple: Data root tuple to prove inclusion of.
params._tupleRootNonce: Nonce of the tuple root to prove against.
